NORTHMAN-RAGE.description: The red effect will not trigger when the card is played, but instead get added to the [rage]Rage Queue[/rage].
NORTHMAN-RAGE.title: Rage
NORTHMAN-INVOKE.description: The next card in the [rage]Rage Queue[/rage] triggers X additional times.
NORTHMAN-INVOKE.title: Invoke X
NORTHMAN-ANGER.description: This card generates (or diminishes) [rage]Anger[/rage]. When you reach 5 [rage]Anger[/rage], the [rage]Rage Queue[/rage] triggers.
NORTHMAN-ANGER.title: Anger
